name: PT. Map Boga Adiperkasa Tbk
summary: PT. Map Boga Adiperkasa Tbk, through its subsidiaries, operates caf√É¬©s and restaurants in Indonesia. The company operates 566 retail stores across 33 Indonesian cities with a portfolio of Starbucks, Pizza Express/Pizza Marzano, Krispy Kreme, Cold Stone Creamery, Godiva, Genki Sushi, and Paul Bakery brands. The company was formerly known as PT. Creasi Aksesoris Indonesia. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT. Map Boga Adiperkasa Tbk is a subsidiary of PT. Mitra Adiperkasa Tbk.
